raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 5,
    "R1.4": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding evidence, flagging multiple issues with the baseline selection, headline comparison, and internal timeline inconsistency.",
    "R1.4": "The agent maps the novelty claim against prior work (PLAsTiCC/ELASTiCC) and identifies sharp deltas, demonstrating a clear understanding of the relevant literature.",
    "R1.7": "The agent audits every load-bearing citation, flagging missing key works (PLAsTiCC/ELASTiCC) with bibliographic precision.",
    "RX.1": "The agent marks confidence and uncertainty for each recommendation, disclosing potential errors in publication years, taxonomies, or reported F1 figures.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), addressing all relevant dimensions without drift.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free, with no new errors, fabrications, or harmful content introduced.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, demonstrating transparency and accountability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.95,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.95
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding evidence, flagging multiple issues with the baseline selection, headline comparison, and internal timeline inconsistency.
rationale.R1.4: The agent maps the novelty claim against prior work (PLAsTiCC/ELASTiCC) and identifies sharp deltas, demonstrating a clear understanding of the relevant literature.
rationale.R1.7: The agent audits every load-bearing citation, flagging missing key works (PLAsTiCC/ELASTiCC) with bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks confidence and uncertainty for each recommendation, disclosing potential errors in publication years, taxonomies, or reported F1 figures.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), addressing all relevant dimensions without drift.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free, with no new errors, fabrications, or harmful content introduced.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, demonstrating transparency and accountability.
